response:
best_ext = extensions[0]
best_strength = sum(1 if c.isupper() else -1 if c.islower() else 0 for c in best_ext)

for ext in extensions[1:]:
    strength = sum(1 if c.isupper() else -1 if c.islower() else 0 for c in ext)
    if strength > best_strength:
        best_strength = strength
        best_ext = ext

return class_name + "." + best_ext
